Always refer to the project specification located in .github/initial-spec.md for logic and architecture details.

Example PDFs for testing and reference:
- assets/pdfs/example-pdfs/Briefmarken.1Stk.07.04.2026_1916.pdf (single 0.95€ stamp with matrix code: A0 05BF A50E 00 0000 002B)
- assets/pdfs/example-pdfs/TestPrint.pdf (multi-stamp grid layout for testing)
- assets/pdfs/example-pdfs/TestPrint-full.pdf (full 4-column grid with up to 8 rows)
